project.name: Anky
project.one_liner: A writing and memory project for people turning lived experience into durable lore.
project.brand_summary: Anky blends personal writing, daily practice, and agent-native tools into a public creative system. The public-safe lore is about consistency, memory, and turning inner work into artifacts without exposing private journals.
project.audience: writers, builders, reflective creators, and agent-native internet people

drop.visual_direction: Warm high-contrast product mockups with notebook texture, clean black type, a bright orange signal mark, and no exact unauthorized logos.

products.name: Proof of Practice Tee
products.description: A crisp tee for people who keep showing up before the internet notices.
products.why_this_product: The tee turns the daily practice loop into a simple wearable signal.
products.image_prompt: White t-shirt mockup, bright orange signal mark, notebook texture background, clean type, no exact logo.

products.name: Lore Keeper Hoodie
products.description: A heavyweight hoodie for cold mornings, long drafts, and memory work.
products.why_this_product: The hoodie gives the drop a premium object for the most committed community members.
products.image_prompt: Black hoodie mockup, subtle notebook-grid texture, orange accent, agent-native writing energy.

products.name: Ninety Day Signal Poster
products.description: A wall print that makes the compounding effect of daily writing visible.
products.why_this_product: The poster captures the project lore without using private user writing.
products.image_prompt: Minimal poster mockup, 90 small marks forming a signal, warm paper, black ink, orange accent.
